gt_sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) = '2011' AND T1.Location = 'North Pole'
pred_sql:
SELECT b.Name
FROM badges b
JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', b.Date) = '2011'
  AND TRIM(u.Location) = 'North Pole';
question: Provide the badge names received in 2011 for the user whose location is in the North Pole.
